pr_f_flipped_given_edit.definition: Fraction of samples where best LR rewrite has lr_prob < 0.5

pr_model_flipped_given_edit.definition: Among samples where original is a refusal, fraction where lr_best is compliance

pr_model_flipped_given_f_flipped.definition: Concordance (matches behavior_verifier.concordance): of probe-flipped samples (with both variants judged), fraction that behavior-flipped (orig=refusal AND lr_best=compliance)

pr_model_flipped_given_f_flipped_orig_re.definition: Stricter version: denominator restricted to f-flipped samples whose original was judged a refusal
